ExportQuery:
SELECT providerId,
named_struct('first',FirstName,'last',LastName,'middle',MiddleInitial) as name, 
array(named_struct('taxonomyCode',TaxonomyCode1, 'hpSpecialityCode',HpSpecialtyCode1)) as taxonomy,
NPI, 
prescribePrivilege, 
DEA, 
contracted
FROM QueryResult
WHERE FileLayoutDescription = 'CHCProvider' and ifnull(providerId,'') <>''
AND ifnull(LastName,'') <>''
AND ifnull(NPI,'') <>''
